_comment: Recommended Firebase RTDB rules for prakrutik-kheti-c0a89. Paste contents (minus this comment) at: https://console.firebase.google.com/u/0/project/prakrutik-kheti-c0a89/database/prakrutik-kheti-c0a89-default-rtdb/rules then click Publish. Audit: tested 2026-06-19.
_critical: These rules do NOT enforce per-user write isolation because the apps don't use Firebase Auth. They DO close the worst hole: leaking farmer passwords from farmerAuth/. Migrating to Firebase Auth is the #1 follow-up so writes can be properly scoped to authenticated users.
_followup_required: Migrate admin and farmer auth to Firebase Auth (Phone OTP or email link).
After migration, scope writes to authenticated users with role-based rules.
Add field-level rules to prevent farmers from editing other farmers' submissions.
Move Cloudinary upload preset to a Firebase Function (so the unsigned preset is no longer client-visible).
Cap the size of submissions/items arrays (e.g., max 200 items) to prevent abuse.
